tagline: Sonoma County's fiberglass pool specialists — 1,500+ pools and counting.
seoDescription: West Coast Fiberglass Pools is a family-owned, CSLB-licensed swimming pool builder serving Santa Rosa and Sonoma County for over 30 years — fiberglass pool construction, spas, and water features, with a 5-star reputation.
heroHeading: Fiberglass pools, done by people who only build pools
heroSubheading: For more than 30 years and over 1,500 installs, the Cerini family has built fiberglass swimming pools across Sonoma, Napa, Lake, and Mendocino — a focused craft, not a sideline.
highlights: CSLB-licensed pool builder — top 2% BuildZoom score in California
Family-owned by the Cerini family — over 30 years in business
Serving Sonoma, Napa, Lake & Mendocino Counties
aboutBody: West Coast Fiberglass Pools is a family-owned business proudly managed and owned by Jeff and Zanne Cerini along with their son, Tyler. For more than 30 years they have specialized exclusively in fiberglass pool installation — and with over 1,500 pools in the ground, the experience shows in every project.

That focus is the whole point: where many contractors build pools among a dozen other things, the Cerinis do one thing and do it well. The company is CSLB-licensed with a BuildZoom score that ranks in the top 2% of California's licensed contractors, and earns consistent 5-star reviews for craftsmanship and follow-through long after the pool is filled.

services.title: Fiberglass Pool Construction
services.description: Full fiberglass swimming pool installation, from layout and excavation to a finished, swim-ready pool.

services.title: New Pool Construction
services.description: New backyard pools sized and shaped to your space, your family, and your budget.

services.title: Spas & Water Features
services.description: Integrated spas and water features that turn a pool into a backyard retreat.

services.title: Pool Options & Upgrades
services.description: Finishes, decking, lighting, and equipment options matched to how you'll actually use the pool.

services.title: Pool Renovation
services.description: Updates and renovations that bring an older pool back to life.

notes: VERIFIED 2026-06-29 from westcoastfiberglasspools.com (dated early-2000s .php site, non-responsive — weak-site bar PASSED), Yelp (42 reviews), Birdeye (5.0, 40 reviews), BuildZoom (score 114, top 2% CA), BBB. Owners: Jeff & Zanne Cerini + son Tyler Cerini. Phone (707) 349-2880. Owner-direct email jeffmail3006@yahoo.com (on their site). Address 2360 Mendocino Ave, Ste A2-387, Santa Rosa CA 95403. 30+ years, 1,500+ pools. Rating used: 5.0 / 40 (Birdeye) — real. Founding year not exactly stated ('over 30 years') so established omitted; '30 years / 1,500+ pools' kept as highlights, not a fabricated year. No verbatim review captured — testimonials empty.
